description: Document an Assessment and Plan for Jayson Fadel (DOB: 1992-06-30) in an encounter. Assessment: 'Essential hypertension, well-controlled on current triple-therapy regimen. Blood pressure at goal. No evidence of end-organ damage. Patient adherent to medications.' Plan: 'Continue amLODIPine/HCTZ/Olmesartan combination as prescribed. Basic Metabolic Panel to monitor renal function and electrolytes. Return to clinic in 3 months for blood pressure recheck. Reinforce lifestyle modifications: DASH diet, sodium restriction <2g/day, regular aerobic exercise 150 min/week. Patient counseled on medication adherence and signs of hypotension.'
